All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

P

PADDING_BOTTOM - Static variable in class app.gui.style.PaddingConstants
An asymmetrical layout allocation prioritizing a deep 30-pixel lower baseline safety buffer.
PADDING_LARGE - Static variable in class app.gui.style.PaddingConstants
An expansive 30-pixel outer safety boundary applied around complex views or macro panel partitions.
PADDING_LEFT - Static variable in class app.gui.style.PaddingConstants
An asymmetrical layout allocation prioritizing an extended 30-pixel left margin offset alignment.
PADDING_NONE - Static variable in class app.gui.style.PaddingConstants
A zeroed margin setting used to completely strip outer component padding constraints.
PADDING_RIGHT - Static variable in class app.gui.style.PaddingConstants
An asymmetrical layout allocation prioritizing an extended 30-pixel right margin offset alignment.
PADDING_STANDARD - Static variable in class app.gui.style.PaddingConstants
Standard universal layout separation metrics applying an even 10-pixel buffer across all component edges.
PADDING_TOP - Static variable in class app.gui.style.PaddingConstants
An asymmetrical layout allocation prioritizing an elevated 30-pixel header accent safety buffer.
PaddingConstants - Class in app.gui.style
A central constants warehouse specifying standardized spacing and layout padding configurations.
PaddingConstants() - Constructor for class app.gui.style.PaddingConstants
 
parseData(JsonNode) - Method in interface app.service.DataSourceParser
Deserializes and maps a raw root hierarchical JSON tree node structure into a list of structured domain data records.
parseData(JsonNode) - Method in class app.service.impl.datasource.YahooFinanceParser
Extracts multi-layer historical transactional pricing sequences from a Yahoo Finance hierarchical JSON structural document tree, mapping valid lines into a continuous index.
parseData(List<DataRecord>) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService
Transforms a generic collection list of financial domain record objects into a primitive 2D matrix structure format compatible with the underlying mathematical library matrices.
parseData(List<DataRecord>) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.QuantumDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService
Transforms a generic collection list of financial domain records into a primitive 2D matrix structure.
parseData(List<FinancialIndicators>) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService
Transforms a generic collection list of financial domain record objects into a primitive 2D matrix structure format compatible with the underlying mathematical library matrices.
parseData(List<FinancialIndicators>) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.QuantumFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService
Transforms a generic collection list of financial domain records into a primitive 2D matrix structure.
parseData(List<T>) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseAnomaliesDetectionService
Transforms a generic collection list of financial domain record objects into a primitive 2D matrix structure format compatible with the underlying mathematical library matrices.
parseData(List<T>) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService
Transforms a generic collection list of financial domain records into a primitive 2D matrix structure.
performSearch(String, LocalDateTime, String, String) - Method in class app.gui.views.BaseAnomalyDetectionPanel
Abstract method tasked with interfacing with the application's controller layer to actually start the anomaly detection calculations.
performSearch(String, LocalDateTime, String, String) - Method in class app.gui.views.DataRecordAnomalyDetectionPanel
Abstract method tasked with interfacing with the application's controller layer to actually start the anomaly detection calculations.
performSearch(String, LocalDateTime, String, String) - Method in class app.gui.views.FinancialIndicatorsAnomalyDetectionPanel
Abstract method tasked with interfacing with the application's controller layer to actually start the anomaly detection calculations.
PRIMARY - Static variable in class app.gui.style.AppColors
The core primary branding accent color.
PRIMARY_HOVER - Static variable in class app.gui.style.AppColors
The interactive hover highlight variation of the primary brand color.
PrimaryButton - Class in app.gui.components
A customized standard action execution button utilizing rounded configurations.
PrimaryButton(String) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.PrimaryButton
Constructs a PrimaryButton initialized with designated label text and brand parameters.
PrimaryButton(String, ActionListener) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.PrimaryButton
Constructs a PrimaryButton initialized with label text and maps an immediate action context callback.
